User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the system (Landlord or Admin).

Property.title: Property
Property.description: Represents a physical real estate asset.

Tenant.title: Tenant
Tenant.description: Represents a person renting a property.

/users/{userId}.description: System user profiles. Rules: Users can read/write their own document. A user with role 'super-admin' in their own profile at /users/{request.auth.uid} is authorized to list, get, create, update, and delete all documents in this collection.

/properties/{propertyId}.description: Property assets. Rules: Landlords can read/write documents where 'landlordId' equals their UID. A user with role 'super-admin' in their profile at /users/{request.auth.uid} has full global access (list, get, create, update, delete) to all documents in this collection.

/tenants/{tenantId}.description: Tenant records. Rules: Landlords can read/write documents where 'landlordId' equals their UID. A user with role 'super-admin' in their profile at /users/{request.auth.uid} has full global access (list, get, create, update, delete) to all documents in this collection.

/invoices/{invoiceId}.description: Rental invoices. Rules: Landlords can read/write documents where 'landlordId' equals their UID. A user with role 'super-admin' in their profile at /users/{request.auth.uid} has full global access (list, get, create, update, delete) to all documents in this collection.
